about.title: WHO I AM
about.bio1: Hello, I am Mostafa Omar, a passionate front-end developer and web enthusiast. I building clean and interactive websites and turning ideas into reality. I am skilled in React, Next.js, and Tailwind, and I enjoy learning new technologies and constantly improving my skills for easier and faster user experience. Outside of programming, I am curious about design, user experience, and personal growth.
about.bio2: I work with precision and attention to detail, delivering projects quickly and efficiently. I don't let anything slow me down—if there's a problem, I tackle it head-on until it's solved. Beyond coding, I'm passionate about design, user experience, and constantly improving my skills to create seamless and professional projects.
